cross_service_analysis.note: Note: All methods used are inspector service methods
cross_service_analysis.explanation: All python_methods (list_findings, describe_assessment_templates, describe_assessment_runs) belong to inspector service. No cross-service issues found.
cross_service_analysis.recommendation: No action needed - rules correctly use inspector API methods

test_results.note: 0 checks because no Inspector Classic resources exist in test accounts (expected - Inspector Classic is deprecated)

aws.inspector.resource.inspector_is_enab.issue: Checks if findings exist with service attributes, but doesn't verify if Inspector service is enabled

aws.inspector.assessment.policy_store_en.issue: Checks if template name exists instead of checking policy store encryption

aws.inspector.assessment.role_least_priv.issue: Checks if assessment run exists and is in valid state, but doesn't check IAM role permissions

aws.inspector.assessment.scope_includes_.issue: Checks if target and rules exist, but doesn't verify if 'all asset groups' are included

aws.inspector.finding.inspector_archival.issue: Checks if user attributes exist instead of checking archival export encryption

aws.inspector.finding.inspector_suppress.issue: Checks if user attributes exist instead of checking suppression rules configuration

summary.overall_status: FAIL - 4 out of 9 rules have critical logic issues, 2 have weak logic
